title: Pasaje heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Pasaje with a Z-Score of +3.74. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Pasaje is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 62%, and the wind speed is 4.1 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the temperature is consistently high, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
